projects.title: Memvia
projects.subtitle: AI Resume and Job Application Memory System
projects.description: Built Memvia, a full-stack AI job application assistant that generates tailored resume content and application answers from a curated memory store.
projects.extendedDescription: Developed the FastAPI, Pydantic AI, OpenRouter, SQLite, React, TypeScript, Tailwind, and Vite stack by hand. The system retrieves relevant memories with vector search, reasons over them with agent workflows, and produces application-ready responses or resume drafts while preserving strict formatting constraints.

media.alt: Memvia AI resume and job application assistant demo

projects.impact: Shows end-to-end AI product engineering across memory curation, retrieval, agent reasoning, structured resume generation, and frontend/backend integration.

projects.title: Nero
projects.subtitle: Mobile AI Voice Assistant for Personal Tracking
projects.description: Developed Nero, a React Native and Expo mobile AI voice assistant with tool-calling workflows for workouts, nutrition, and spending.
projects.extendedDescription: Built practical daily workflows around voice input, tool calls, and personal data. Integrated AssemblyAI and ElevenLabs for voice interactions, Plaid for spending analysis, and tracking flows for workouts and nutrition.

media.alt: Nero mobile AI voice assistant demo showing personal tracking workflows.

projects.impact: Turns common personal tracking tasks into voice-driven AI workflows across fitness, nutrition, and finances.

projects.title: AI Voice Agent
projects.subtitle: AI-Powered Voice Agent That Takes Pizza Orders
projects.description: Built an AI voice agent that takes phone orders with Deepgram and Twilio and creates live tickets for restaurant staff.
projects.extendedDescription: Developed the Python voice-agent backend with tool calls for menu retrieval and order tracking, then built a frontend dashboard for tickets and call history. The same pattern can support telephone-based customer service workflows in other businesses.

media.alt: Pizza voice AI agent demo showcasing an AI agent that takes pizza orders over phone.

projects.impact: Demonstrates how phone-based customer support can be routed through an AI agent while still giving staff a live operational dashboard.

projects.title: Physics Grad Match
projects.subtitle: AI-Powered PhD Program Matching Platform
projects.description: Built Physics Grad Match, a commercial web app that matches physics graduate applicants with professors by research niche.
projects.extendedDescription: Scraped university physics departments to build a professor database, extracted applicant research keywords with an LLM, and matched users to professors through vector similarity search. Added Stripe checkout, Supabase storage, and a React frontend to make the tool usable as a commercial product.

media.alt: Physics Grad Match application demo showing the AI-powered matching interface

skills.name: Open AI Embeddings and LLM model APIs

projects.impact: Connects physics graduate applicants with relevant professors by combining scraped department data, LLM keyword extraction, and vector similarity search.

projects.title: Rep Quest
projects.subtitle: Workout Tracking Application
projects.description: Built RepQuest, a workout tracking web app used regularly on mobile to track resistance training progression.
projects.extendedDescription: Developed tracking flows for sets, reps, and weight by pairing a React frontend with backend storage and performance charts. Used the app from my phone for months in the gym.
projects.impact: Supported consistent training by making workout history, progression, and performance metrics easy to log from a phone.
